nodes.name: Index
nodes.description: Entry point to the skill graph — traversable cross-project knowledge

nodes.name: Resolve
nodes.description: Convention for resolving [[wikilinks]] across the knowledge graph and into rules/skills/memory

nodes.name: MOC: Decisions
nodes.description: Map of Content — Architecture Decision Records: why we chose X over Y

nodes.name: ADR: Cdn On Drive
nodes.description: ADR: CDN projects (no build system) stay on Google Drive for easy access

nodes.name: ADR: Chromadb For Project Theta
nodes.description: ADR: Project Theta uses ChromaDB for local vector storage — no cloud dependency, Python-native

nodes.name: ADR: Drizzle Over Prisma
nodes.description: ADR: Project Epsilon Platform chose Drizzle ORM over Prisma for lighter weight and SQL-like syntax

nodes.name: ADR: Firebase Db Only
nodes.description: ADR: TRP uses Firebase for database but Cloudflare Pages for hosting — split architecture

nodes.name: ADR: Firebase Spark
nodes.description: ADR: TRP stays on Firebase Spark (free) — Security Rules replace Cloud Functions

nodes.name: ADR: Git Relay
nodes.description: ADR: Brand B+Brand A deploy evolution — from Drive relay to React SSG to GitHub Actions CI/CD

nodes.name: ADR: Groq For Concierge
nodes.description: ADR: Project Epsilon uses Groq/Llama for the AI concierge — fast, free tier, runs via CF Worker

nodes.name: ADR: Hosting Split
nodes.description: ADR: Different projects use different hosting because each platform has a sweet spot

nodes.name: ADR: Mock Data First
nodes.description: ADR: Project Eta built full UI with mock data before any backend — nail the UX first

nodes.name: ADR: Supabase Over Firebase
nodes.description: ADR: Project Epsilon Platform chose Supabase (PostgreSQL) over Firebase (NoSQL) for relational data

nodes.name: ADR: Vite Over Nextjs
nodes.description: ADR: Project Delta Planner uses Vite/React instead of Next.js — SPA doesn't need SSR

nodes.name: ADR: Workspace Tiers
nodes.description: ADR: Three-tier workspace — Drive for docs, GitHub for backup, local SSD for development

nodes.name: Dependencies
nodes.description: Project dependency map — which shared infrastructure affects which projects. Check here for impact analysis.

nodes.name: MOC: Patterns
nodes.description: Map of Content — 16 cross-project engineering patterns distilled from bugs, fixes, and architecture

nodes.name: Atomic File Operations
nodes.description: Temp file + fsync + atomic rename prevents partial writes and data corruption

nodes.name: Cache Integrity
nodes.description: Dual-source caching needs merge-on-read and auto-healing to prevent silent drift
nodes.source: Project Theta indexer.py — session cache + ChromaDB integrity

nodes.name: Cdn Vs Build Projects
nodes.description: CDN projects live on Drive; build-system projects must live on local SSD

nodes.name: Cloudflare Deploy Pipeline
nodes.description: Three-step Cloudflare Workers pipeline: build → build:cloudflare → wrangler deploy

nodes.name: Composable Workflows
nodes.description: Single → Dual → Triple tech composition builds complex workflows from simple, tested pieces
nodes.source: Project Theta techs.py — composable tech system

nodes.name: Content Classification
nodes.description: Classify by content patterns (imports, keywords, structure), not file paths
nodes.source: Project Theta project_classifier.py — regex-based project detection

nodes.name: Data Corruption Recovery
nodes.description: Code fixes alone don't fix corrupted data — always rebuild/re-seed after data-layer bug fixes
nodes.source: lessons.md > Process & Debugging, Project Theta timestamp saga

nodes.name: Dirty Checking
nodes.description: Dirty-check init and compare must reference the exact same data source or the save button lies

nodes.name: Dual Source Merge
nodes.description: Tag entries with their origin store so delete handlers hit the correct persistence layer

nodes.name: Env File Management
nodes.description: Gitignored .env files need manual copying, dots-in-username encoding, and Vercel newline traps

nodes.name: Firebase Hosting Checklist
nodes.description: Firebase Hosting needs firebase.json hosting section + .firebaserc project link + curl verify
nodes.source: lessons.md > Deployment & Infrastructure, Project Beta 404 incident

nodes.name: Hybrid Search
nodes.description: Semantic embeddings + full-text matching beats either approach alone
nodes.source: Project Theta README.md, fork_detect.py — dual search strategy

nodes.name: Idb Write Through
nodes.description: IndexedDB putAll only upserts — use clear()+putAll() for true write-through sync

nodes.name: Lock Files
nodes.description: PID-based lock files with stale detection prevent concurrent access and survive crashes

nodes.name: Persistence Layers
nodes.description: Multiple storage layers desync silently without deliberate write-through protocols
nodes.source: lessons.md > Data Storage & Persistence, rule:Project Alpha-portal

nodes.name: Rate Limiting
nodes.description: FMP needs 300ms sequential gaps; Cloudflare Workers cap at 50 subrequests on free plan

nodes.name: MOC: Projects
nodes.description: Map of Content — deep graphs for all 9 projects with architecture nodes

nodes.description: Klausy AI chatbot via Cloudflare Worker + Groq API (Llama) for German tourist assistance

nodes.name: epsilon Git Relay
nodes.description: Brand B+Brand A CI/CD: push to main → GitHub Actions → typecheck → build → deploy both sites to Cloudflare Pages

nodes.name: MOC: Project Epsilon Platform
nodes.description: Map of Content — Brand B Platform: Drizzle/Supabase, 3-role auth, route groups

nodes.name: epsilon-platform Database Schema
nodes.description: 6 tables + 3 pgEnums managed by Drizzle ORM with Supabase PostgreSQL

nodes.name: epsilon-platform Role Based Auth
nodes.description: 3-role system (traveler/provider/admin) with role in JWT and role-based middleware

nodes.name: epsilon-platform Supabase Connection
nodes.description: Supabase pooler connection with %2E encoding, IPv6 gotcha, and env backup on Drive

nodes.description: Map of Content — Bob's Project Zeta: Next.js 16 stock dashboard, yahoo-finance2 + FMP APIs

nodes.name: Bsp Api Integration
nodes.description: Dual data sources (yahoo-finance2 + FMP) with rate limiting, sequential fetching, and retry logic

nodes.name: MOC: Project Theta
nodes.description: Map of Content — Project Theta: session indexing, vector search, composable techs, project health

nodes.name: Project Theta Data Model
nodes.description: ChromaDB is source of truth; JSON caches auto-sync; gates and summaries are separate stores

nodes.name: Project Theta Indexing
nodes.description: Session indexing with cache integrity, lock files, active session detection, and large file truncation

nodes.name: Project Theta Project Health
nodes.description: Lavos scanner: tech debt detection, project health monitoring, reminder.md generation

nodes.name: Project Theta Search
nodes.description: Hybrid search combining semantic vectors + full-text matching with era-based time filtering
nodes.source: Project Theta Project Theta.py, fork_detect.py, README.md

nodes.name: Project Theta Techs
nodes.description: Composable workflow automation: fire (build), ice (test), single→dual→triple tech patterns

nodes.name: Brand A Brand Fork
nodes.description: brand-a — English-market brand site, built from the same Brand B codebase, deployed via GitHub Actions CI/CD

nodes.name: MOC: Project Alpha

nodes.name: Detail Modal Fields
nodes.description: 4-column campaign detail layout with dirty-field saving and Comms Center

nodes.name: Sidebar Dual Render
nodes.description: Project Alpha sidebar has TWO renderers — expanded (Canvas) and collapsed (React). Both must update.

nodes.name: Smart Merge
nodes.description: Fresh data vs overrides: import timestamp determines which wins on sync
nodes.source: rule:Project Alpha-portal > Pending Calculation & Smart Merge

nodes.name: Storage Architecture
nodes.description: Project Alpha has 4 persistence layers that must stay in sync — IDB, tempOverrides, metaOverrides, stap_material_data

nodes.name: Trp Ai Integration
nodes.description: Gemini AI via aiService.chat() with persona-aware system prompts and Travel Bestie branding
nodes.source: memory:MEMORY.md > Project Delta Planner — Unified Personas

nodes.name: Trp Firebase Hybrid
nodes.description: Direct Firestore calls + Security Rules instead of Cloud Functions — stays on free Spark plan

nodes.name: Trp Personas System
nodes.description: 7 unified personas defined once in personas.ts — consumed by every page and the AI service

nodes.description: Map of Content — Project Eta: Next.js 15 dashboard, mock data layer, compliance engine, PM system

nodes.description: AppShell client component controls sidebar/topbar/footer — simple mode strips chrome for drivers

nodes.description: 6-tier compliance status logic (expired→current) + PM alert engine (mileage + time triggers)

nodes.name: Project Eta Data Layer
nodes.description: 21 entity types with TypeScript interfaces in src/data/ — pure frontend mock data, API-swap ready

nodes.name: MOC: Runbooks
nodes.description: Map of Content — step-by-step playbooks for common operations. Follow exactly, no improvising.

nodes.name: Runbook: Add Site To Status
nodes.description: Runbook: Register a new site in the /status skill for health checks and local serving

nodes.name: Runbook: Project Theta Reindex
nodes.description: Runbook: Rebuild Project Theta's entire index after bug fixes or data corruption

nodes.name: Runbook: Deploy Project Epsilon
nodes.description: Runbook: Deploy Project Epsilon + brand-a — GitHub Actions CI/CD (automated) or manual Wrangler fallback

nodes.name: Runbook: Deploy Cloudflare Workers
nodes.description: Runbook: Deploy Next.js to Cloudflare Workers via OpenNext — three mandatory steps

nodes.name: Runbook: Deploy Firebase
nodes.description: Runbook: Deploy to Firebase Hosting — verify config, deploy, curl verify, /status check

nodes.name: Runbook: Drive Sync Recovery
nodes.description: Runbook: Fix Google Drive sync storms from leaked node_modules, .git, or other dev artifacts

nodes.name: Runbook: Fresh Clone
nodes.description: Runbook: Clone a project from GitHub and get it running — .env, deps, verify

nodes.name: Runbook: New Firebase Project
nodes.description: Runbook: Create and configure a new Firebase project — from scratch to deployed

nodes.name: Runbook: New Project Setup
nodes.description: Runbook: Full setup for a new project in the workspace — from idea to tracked

nodes.name: Runbook: Project Intake
nodes.description: MANDATORY intake for every new project — connects it to the full brain. No orphans.

nodes.name: MOC: Workflow
nodes.description: Map of Content — how we work: daily routine, skills, planning, verification, self-improvement

nodes.name: Anti Patterns
nodes.description: Collected failures and what they teach — reference before repeating
nodes.source: memory:lessons, Project Theta debugging saga, Project Alpha persistence bugs

nodes.name: Autonomous Bug Fixing
nodes.description: When given a bug report: just fix it. Zero user context-switching required.
nodes.source: CLAUDE.md > Workflow Orchestration > Autonomous Bug Fixing

nodes.name: Demand Elegance
nodes.description: Pause for non-trivial changes and ask 'is there a more elegant way?' — skip for obvious fixes

nodes.name: Morning Workflow
nodes.description: The three-step morning routine: /primer all → /status → /primer <project>. Cold to warm in 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Plan Mode
nodes.description: Enter plan mode for any task with 3+ steps or architectural decisions
nodes.source: CLAUDE.md > Workflow Orchestration > Plan Mode Default

nodes.name: Registry Pattern
nodes.description: Data-driven extensibility: separate registries (sites.md, personas.ts) from logic
nodes.source: memory:lessons > Tooling & Automation, Project Theta techs.py

nodes.name: Self Improvement Loop
nodes.description: After any correction: update lessons.md → memory → rules. Ruthlessly iterate.

nodes.name: Skill Project Theta
nodes.description: Project Theta — session search, time gates, composable techs. The institutional memory engine.

nodes.name: Skill Debt
nodes.description: /debt — Lavos tech debt scanner. Run after /primer when doing a quality pass.

nodes.name: Skill Primer
nodes.description: /primer — auto-gathers project context: git state, knowledge graph, Project Theta sessions, TODOs

nodes.name: Skill Reflect
nodes.description: /reflect — end-of-session debrief with 3 gates: Progress, Quality, Output Verification.

nodes.name: Skill Spec
nodes.description: /spec — requirements-to-task converter. Standalone or inline from primer router.

nodes.name: Skill Status
nodes.description: /status — health checks, local server launcher, browser tab opener. Keeps the lights on.

nodes.name: Subagent Strategy
nodes.description: One task per subagent — keep main context clean, throw compute at complexity

nodes.name: Verification Before Done
nodes.description: Never mark complete without proving it works — staff engineer standard
nodes.source: CLAUDE.md > Workflow Orchestration > Verification Before Done
